title: wedelia souzae
intro: Wedelia souzae, also known as the Yellow Daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Wedelia souzae include treating various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
